subject: Geography
title: Marble Caves of Chile
description: Learn Marble Caves of Chile in one minute.

hook.text: Chile's Marble Caves hover over turquoise water so blue it looks digitally enhanced.

buildup.text: Lake General Carrera's waves carved swirling patterns into pure marble cliffs over 6,000 years.

discovery.text: The cave walls reflect the glacial lake's color, creating chambers of living blue light.

twist.text: The caves can only be reached by boat and change color with the seasons and water level.

climax.text: Nature sculpted marble into art that no human could design or replicate.

punchline.text: Water carved a cathedral out of marble, then lit it blue.

quiz.question: What carved the Marble Caves of Chile?
options: Lake waves over thousands of years
